title: Matched-support auditing tests anatomical specificity in facial artificial intelligence
description: Code, aggregate source data, protocols and publication figures for a matched-support audit of dataset-level regional predictive sufficiency. The release excludes the governance-limited PD-DBS matrix, reconstructed YouTube videos and identifiable facial images.
notes: Dual-licensed release: Python source code under MIT; aggregate source data, figures, protocols, documentation and reproduction reports under CC BY 4.0. Third-party materials are excluded and retain their original terms.
